response.justification: Maria is a strong senior/staff-level generalist with roughly 15-19 years of hands-on experience, an entrepreneurial streak (founder of GISCollective), and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling. However, this role is a director-level IC focused on AI strategy, and her background shows no recognized AI/ML expertise, no shipped AI-powered products or platforms of note, no advanced AI-related degree, and no evidence of operating at principal scope — advising strategic customers, shaping product direction, or influencing organizations. The gap between senior full-stack engineering and AI strategy leadership is too wide for this specific position.
strengths: Meets the 15-year experience and bachelor's degree minimums with broad full-stack, embedded, and infrastructure exposure
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of an open-source geo-data platform used in production by Green Map
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic developer tooling
concerns: No recognized AI/ML expertise or demonstrated AI products/platforms, the core requirement of the role
Career trajectory is senior/staff IC on delivery teams, with no evidence of director-level strategic scope or executive advisory work
No master's or PhD in an AI-related field, and public talks/workshops center on testing and GIS rather than AI or cloud strategy

key_factors.factor: Missing recognized AI expertise and AI product track record
Seniority gap vs. director-level strategy role
Meets experience minimum with entrepreneurial and recent AI-tooling exposure
